Uses of Class
com.bfo.json.AbstractReader

  • Uses of AbstractReader in com.bfo.json

    Subclasses of AbstractReader in com.bfo.json
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborReader
    A CBOR reader
    class 
    JsonReader
    A JSON reader
    class 
    MsgpackReader
    A Msgpack reader
    class 
    YamlReader
    A Yaml reader, almost entirely based on the Tokenizer from the YamlBeans project.
    Methods in com.bfo.json that return AbstractReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setCharset(Charset charset)
    When reading text-based formats (eg Json) from an InputStream, set the Charset to use for decoding.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setCodingErrorAction(CodingErrorAction action)
    Set the action to perform when converting an invalid byte sequence to UTF-8.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setDraining()
    Indicate that after the read completes, the reader should verify there is no more content following the input.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setFinal()
    Indicate that the current input is the final input.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setInput(InputStream in)
    Set an InputStream to use as the next source for this reader.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setInput(CharSequence in)
    Set an Readable to use as the next source for this reader, which must be a text-based format The input cannot be changed while hasNext() returns true.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setInput(Readable in)
    Set an Readable to use as the next source for this reader, which must be a text-based format The input cannot be changed while hasNext() returns true.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setInput(ByteBuffer in)
    Set an ByteBuffer to use as the next source for this reader.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setInput(ReadableByteChannel in)
    Set an ReadableByteChannel to use as the next source for this reader.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setLineCounting()
    Require text-based formats (eg Json) to keep track of line and column numbers when reading.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setNoLineCounting()
    Permit text-based formats (eg Json) to not keep track of line and column numbers when reading.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setNonDraining()
    Indicate that the Reader should try not read any more content after object, because more content may follow.
    AbstractReader
    AbstractReader.setPartial()
    Indicate that the input may be followed by more input when it runs out.
    Methods in com.bfo.json with parameters of type AbstractReader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Json
    Json.read(AbstractReader reader)
    Read an object from the specified AbstractReader
